facts: RDS(on) max 99 mOhm at VGS=10 V and Tj=25 C
datasheet_target.scope_note: 公开数据表仅作电学目标；二维 SJ 模型不是专有 CoolMOS 单元的复制。

gate_contact.source_evidence: Sentaurus W-2024.09 Power/MOSFET_SuperJunction applies Material=PolySi(N) to the gate electrode; required to preserve the seed contact work-function semantics

candidate_freeze.scope_note: baseline 四静态门通过；refined-v1 的 Vth 差 0.118263 V 历史失败保留。refined-v2-local 在固定 baseline AreaFactor 下完成三级趋势并通过不变阈值，四静态案和调度证据均闭合。六份既有 TDR 已完成关断场复核，轨迹按 500 V ImpactIonization 敏感标记冻结且不是 seed track。该结构仍只是参考模型，HeavyIon 仍须由精确哈希绑定的独立证据显式授权。

drift_thickness.source_evidence: attempt16 reached the 1e-6 A/um criterion at 629.6 V with peak impact ionization still inside the drift at x=56.0 um; retain 64 um and test balanced pillar-density scaling instead of further thickness growth

p_pillar_acceptor_concentration.source_evidence: attempt13 charge-balance candidate derived from NA*Wp=ND*pitch with ND=5.5e15 cm^-3, pitch=6.0 um, and Wp=1.8 um; this is a reference-model calibration value, not a datasheet fact

sj_pillar_doping_scale.source_evidence: attempt24 scale 0.8 is bound to the successful baseline run set: BV 824.279280 V, Vth 4.012162 V, RDSon 0.087 ohm, and 650 V leakage 7.3603472e-6 A. refined-v1 fixed-baseline-AreaFactor Vth shifted by 0.118263 V and remains a preserved FAILED history. refined-v2-local produced Vth 3.856898 V; its v1-to-v2 shift is 0.0369998 V with estimated remaining error 0.0168462 V, while BV, conduction, leakage, four static gates, and scheduler evidence all pass the unchanged contract.

p_pillar_width.source_evidence: candidate 0.9 um rejected: the physical 1e-6 A/um criterion regressed from 63.44 V to 59.74 V in run MOSFET650_BV__candidate_attempt11_p_pillar_width_0p9__20260715T163421611Z__e48ba83b

p_pillar_drain_setback.source_evidence: attempt14 moved peak impact ionization from x=44.296875 um beside the drain to x=37.96875 um inside the drift region while BV remained 563.7 V; retain 1.5 um as a topology correction, not as a BV gain

gate_oxide_thickness.source_evidence: 0.06 um reference-model assumption; attempt19 wires this existing DSL value into SDE after audit found the prior polygon hardcoded to a nonuniform ~0.02-0.09 um envelope

body_implant_y_start.source_evidence: attempt20 aligns the P-body surface implant start with the corrected 0.06 um oxide outer edge at y=2.86 um; attempt19 doping audit measured only ~5.7e15 cm^-3 net acceptor at y=2.9 um. The earlier 2.7 um candidate predated SJ charge-balance and oxide-contract corrections and remains rejected as a non-equivalent structure.

body_peak_acceptor_concentration.source_evidence: attempts21-23 were rejected: increasing P-body peak shifted the raw transfer curve but collapsed datasheet-point conduction and made AreaFactor physically implausible. Restore 1.5e17 cm^-3 and tune Vth with orthogonal interface charge.

interface_fixed_charge_concentration.source_evidence: first-order Cox estimate for the corrected 0.06 um oxide: negative fixed charge should shift the body-aligned Vth from 2.61 V toward the 4 V typical target while preserving P-body conduction and strict SJ charge balance; syntax follows the Sentaurus TrenchGateNMOS_Ron_BV interface contract

body_implant_y_end.source_evidence: candidate 4.6 um rejected: MOSFET BV current criterion occurred at 0.198 V in run MOSFET650_BV__candidate_attempt06_body_implant_y_end_4p6__20260715T153353705Z__b4cb4528

gate_corner_radius.source_evidence: 0.2 um learned-reference fillet converted the 51.71 V numerical failure into a physical 1e-6 A/um criterion at 63.44 V in run MOSFET650_BV__candidate_attempt07_gate_corner_radius_0p2__20260715T155352640Z__9da6bd9d

body_implant_depth.source_evidence: candidate 1.2 um rejected: the physical 1e-6 A/um criterion moved from 63.44 V to 61.32 V in run MOSFET650_BV__candidate_attempt08_body_implant_depth_1p2__20260715T160938652Z__a69b50fd

track_x.source_evidence: 500 V verified-mesh ImpactIonization localization; start is 0.01 um beyond the x=3.19 um Si/Oxide tip. Evidence: field_track_localization_v2.json SHA-256 880ca5633509b92ab662c5c603202807dc89df1f631c832022981b2133a12e7e

track_y.source_evidence: 500 V ImpactIonization maximum is at y=6.0 um; the frozen path is clamped by the recorded 0.01 um strict-Silicon interior margin on run MOSFET650_FIELD_V500__checkpoint_b_field_localization_v1__20260716T032755074Z__58d0108c

track_length.source_evidence: strict-interior depth path from x=3.20 to x=63.99 um on the 64 um verified refined-v2-local mesh

track_direction.source_evidence: device-depth direction aligned with the strict-interior Silicon path and verified field cutline; replaces the geometry-invalid seed direction

mesh_consistency_contract.comparison: same frozen physical candidate and identical static decks/parameters; only SDE mesh controls change
mesh_consistency_contract.area_factor_policy: use baseline AreaFactor unchanged for refined Vth, conduction, and 650 V leakage comparisons; refined self-calibrated AreaFactor is diagnostic only
mesh_consistency_contract.bv_policy: first raw high-terminal InnerVoltage sample whose absolute eCurrent+hCurrent reaches 1e-6 A/um; solver failure is never BV
pass_requirements: all refined datasheet static gates pass
all four baseline/refined deltas are within threshold
all eight refined runs are successful leased one-thread SDevice runs
each device run set binds one immutable refined mesh hash
mesh_consistency_contract.rationale: BV uses a 2% discretization bound; Vth uses a 0.1 V absolute bound; conduction allows 5%; leakage allows 10% because it is a sub-pA/um interpolated quantity. Missing or non-finite evidence fails closed.

static_gates.bv_criterion: I(Drain) >= 1e-6 A/um during monotonic off-state ramp; first raw high-terminal InnerVoltage sample
